yaml:
description: Next.js deployment & production — platforms, self-host, CI; links repo paths via payload-deployment
alwaysApply: true

description: App Router — structure, layouts, navigation, dynamic & parallel routes, special files
globs: src/app/**/*.{ts,tsx},src/middleware.ts
alwaysApply: false

description: Next.js caching, tags, revalidatePath/Tag — pairs with OpenNext & Payload webhooks
globs: src/**/*.{ts,tsx},open-next.config.ts
alwaysApply: false

description: Route Handlers (route.ts), proxy.js, request/response patterns
globs: src/**/route.{ts,tsx},src/**/proxy.{ts,tsx},src/middleware.ts
alwaysApply: false

description: next.config.js, webpack, Turbopack, OpenNext, adapters
globs: next.config.js,open-next.config.ts,next-sitemap.config.cjs
alwaysApply: false

description: Next.js Guides hub — topic tutorials (auth, i18n, testing, …) with official links
alwaysApply: false

description: Deprecated — use next-basics.mdc + next-features-overview.mdc + next-*.mdc topics
alwaysApply: false
